claim.summary: BTC directional thesis has evidence, but current entry quality is poor.
claim.subject: BTC/USD

risk_classification.summary: High leverage or thin timing would make this unsafe for beginners.

supporting: Independent public sources report similar flow.
opposing: Entry quality is weak after the move.
Reward-to-risk is not attractive without a reset.

attention.summary: Public attention is rising quickly, but attention is not evidence.

tradeability.summary: Liquidity is acceptable, but entry quality and leverage risk are poor.

invalidation.summary: Thesis weakens if price fails to hold the prior breakout area.

professional_wait_for: A defined invalidation level or a better entry after the chase fades.
